description:
ABtoro is eToro's internal system and app for analysing AB test results, allowing us to discern customers with scientific precision. It analyses over 300 metrics by dozens of user segments for each AB so we can know at a glance what happened. It embodies cutting-edge research and methodology to make sure we surpass competition. 

Main functionalities:

- Allows saving ABs in one place with 300 metrics sliced by dozens of user segments with validity checks

- Warns us if an AB creates damage to our balance sheet while it runs in real time

- Covers whole AB cycle with experiment designer, easy test import, LLM summaries, AI opportunities discovery module, results commentary by responsible analysts

- Determines our ability to impact customers across all past experiments and ask AI for our best results 

For curated, at-a-glance, one-click results and more features such as AI opportunities, please go to the app: https://adb-dp-5142916747090026.6.azuredatabricks.net/driver-proxy/o/5142916747090026/0207-112048-ex43ovjs/7258/ 

This genie can:

- Tell you what experiments are being run, have been conducted and what is the summary of the results
- What were the significant results you should base your decisions on and which user segments are responsible for driving this result
- Can tell in real time if a test is damaging our main CVR metrics like CVR to Trade, CVR to deposit, etc.
title: ABtoro Genie (AB Tests Results)
